breaking_changes.title: PHP 8.0.2 minimum requirement
breaking_changes.description: Laravel 9 requires PHP 8.0.2 or greater.

breaking_changes.title: Composer dependency updates required
breaking_changes.description: Update laravel/framework to ^9.0, nunomaduro/collision to ^6.1. Replace facade/ignition with spatie/laravel-ignition ^1.0. Update pusher/pusher-php-server to ^5.0 if applicable.

breaking_changes.title: PHP return type definitions added to framework methods
breaking_changes.description: Laravel 9 added return types to methods like offsetGet, offsetSet, count, getIterator, jsonSerialize, and SessionHandlerInterface methods. Subclasses overriding these methods must add matching return types.

breaking_changes.title: Flysystem upgraded to v3
breaking_changes.description: Laravel 9 uses league/flysystem v3. Write operations overwrite by default, no longer throw exceptions on failure (return false), reading missing files returns null, deleting missing files returns true, cached adapters removed, custom filesystem registration changed.

breaking_changes.title: SwiftMailer replaced by Symfony Mailer
breaking_changes.description: Swift_Message and all Swift_* classes removed. withSwiftMessage() renamed to withSymfonyMessage(). getSwiftMailer() renamed to getSymfonyTransport(). Message class now wraps Symfony Email object. MessageSent event changed.

breaking_changes.title: Custom cast set() method now invoked with null
breaking_changes.description: The set() method of custom cast classes is now invoked when the attribute is set to null. Previously null was not passed through. Custom casts must handle null values.

breaking_changes.title: BelongsToMany firstOrNew/firstOrCreate/updateOrCreate changed
breaking_changes.description: These methods now compare attributes against the related model table instead of the pivot table. firstOrCreate now accepts a second  array argument.

breaking_changes.title: HTTP Client default 30-second timeout
breaking_changes.description: The HTTP client now has a default timeout of 30 seconds. Previously no timeout was configured, causing requests to potentially hang indefinitely.

breaking_changes.title: Postgres schema config renamed to search_path
breaking_changes.description: The 'schema' configuration option for Postgres connections should be renamed to 'search_path' in config/database.php.

breaking_changes.title: assertDeleted() renamed to assertModelMissing()
breaking_changes.description: All calls to assertDeleted should be updated to assertModelMissing.

breaking_changes.title: lang directory moved to project root
breaking_changes.description: The resources/lang directory is now located at the root project directory (lang). Packages publishing language files should use app()->langPath() instead of hardcoded paths.

breaking_changes.title: password validation rule renamed to current_password
breaking_changes.description: The 'password' validation rule string has been renamed to 'current_password'.

breaking_changes.title: when/unless methods now execute closures as conditions
breaking_changes.description: Closures passed as the first argument to when/unless are now executed and their return value is used as the boolean condition, instead of the closure object being loosely compared to true.

breaking_changes.title: Unvalidated array keys excluded by default
breaking_changes.description: Unvalidated array keys are now always excluded from validated data even when no allowed keys are specified via the array rule.

breaking_changes.title: TrustProxies middleware updated
breaking_changes.description: Update TrustProxies to use Illuminate\Http\Middleware\TrustProxies instead of Fideloper\Proxy. Update $headers property to use individual HEADER_X_FORWARDED_* constants. Remove fideloper/proxy dependency.

breaking_changes.title: Collection reduceWithKeys removed, reduceMany renamed
breaking_changes.description: reduceWithKeys() removed (use reduce() instead). reduceMany() renamed to reduceSpread().

breaking_changes.title: getFacadeAccessor must return container binding key
breaking_changes.description: getFacadeAccessor() must return a string container binding key, not an object instance.

breaking_changes.title: API throttle middleware changed to named rate limiter
breaking_changes.description: The api middleware group should reference 'throttle:api' (a named rate limiter) instead of the legacy 'throttle:6,1' format.

breaking_changes.title: New Attribute::make() accessor/mutator syntax available
breaking_changes.description: Laravel 9 introduced simplified accessor/mutator syntax using Attribute::make(). Old getFooAttribute/setFooAttribute style still works but is deprecated.

breaking_changes.title: opis/closure replaced by laravel/serializable-closure
breaking_changes.description: SerializableClosureFactory and SerializableClosure classes removed. Use laravel/serializable-closure instead.
